description: This file defines the main activity for an Android application using Kotlin. It manages user authentication, biometric unlocking, app lock state, UI rendering for login, locked, and main screens, and interacts with other components like auth manager, biometric auth, and app lock observer.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main activity that handles app start, login, biometric unlock, and main UI screens.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, sets the layout, and adds app lock observer.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Re-renders UI when activity resumes, e.g., after app lock/unlock.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Determines which UI to display based on login and lock state.

methods.name: showInitFailure
methods.description: Displays an error screen if the app failed to initialize.

methods.name: showLogin
methods.description: Displays login UI and handles login attempts.

methods.name: showLocked
methods.description: Displays biometric authentication UI to unlock the app.

methods.name: showMain
methods.description: Displays the main application UI with session info and API call options.

methods.name: setRoot
methods.description: Replaces the current view in the root container.
